thread_title: 💭「Processing」Raid stuck after clearing fight seemingly only on certain parties?

content:
For the past week or so my game has been crashing almost constantly during combat.  I can’t seem to make it through even a single combat without a crash, occasionally accompanied by audio bugs. I play on iOS mobile. 

- The game runs fine outside of combat.
- Crashes only seem to occur during combat. 
- They usually occur during awakener Exalts or enemy abilities.
- Combat can be stuttery and often freezes or leaves me on a black screen for up to a minute at a time.
- There’s also audio bugs that either accompany the crashes or occur on their own, where it sounds like when an audio track is too loud and it bugs out.
- I have tried the repair feature and it didn’t help.
我到底犯什么天条了

Increasing the amount from 50k to 60k can hardly be considered a band-aid, let alone a solution. We're now 3 hours past reset and almost half of the 60k has been downed. After seeing what happened the first day, players are now rushing the boss even faster.
The number will have to be much larger or the limit removed altogether if we want more players to have a chance to even participate in this event.

💭「Processing」Cruel homage posse bug
Evernight's Revel requires Doresain to personally kill the enemy in order to obtain it
✅「Answered」Cruel homage posse bug
he doesn't only get Revel on killing enemies
he specifically gains Revel when he gains a corpse
so for example hitting a boss with his exalt, also gives him an Evernight Revel
because due to this passive
he gains corpse on hitting bosses with his exalt
so in short:
- Doresain gains a corpse when hitting bosses with his exalt, or killing enemies.
- Both cases will give him an Evernight Revel
- Doresain gains a corpse if you use Cruel Homage posse
- The above case does NOT give him Evernight Revel
there's not reason for this to work in this way, since his passive only reads "When Doresain gains a corpse, put Evernight Revel into your hand"
please review this more thoroughly <@1131790839291596841>
If that is intended, the talent text should be changed

The game designer has confirmed that only the situation in the blue box can receive Evernight's Revel.
In the green box (with Cruel homage), only corpses can be obtained. Many players have misunderstood here - they thought they could get Evernight's Revel, but the designer is already considering optimizing the description
thats lame, but yeah if thats the case then the description needs to change entirely
If it is any consolation, when I was reading the patch notes from his buff during release, it read to me the say way you're seeing it.
這裡的慶「倖」雖然嚴格意義不至於算錯字，畢竟可以同「幸」字，但目前來說多是用「幸」字比較多。除非用這個「倖」字有什麼特別的用意，不然當我沒說。🤔
boss还有8层死扛，直接死了是怎么回事，有没有懂哥看看是bug还是啥东西

content: I'm not sure if this was ever covered in any dev news, but I was wondering if we could get some sort of drag/trace to move. It's pretty self-explanatory, just trace a line showing the path you want to follow and as you go the events/battles/etc will pop up as normal. Clicking every time to move is rather boring and it hurts my wrist. If players want to cancel the path, they can click anywhere on the map to cancel the path and retrace a new path to move
thread_title: Automatic movement or drag/trace to move

content:
Copy paste over from what I post in the fan discord hopefully the dev see a new player perspective:

As a newbie reading a reddit post about how generous this game is when I decided to give it a try this event has proven otherwise. As most people have said, this raid event is the worst one in all of the gacha i have play since it create insane FOMO for new players as there are so many units/copies they are advice to pull to get their team going ( not even considering the fact that the boss already dead even before I even decide to check it out).

Agree with most of what V said though as this should have been a whole sever thing and everyone should have gotten the rewards as it is an anniversary event that should try to encourage and get in more players (not scare them away). Give the whales/vet an animated profile border or something as a flex would have been great or some less silver and incentivize people to clear the raids I assume.

Since I also see a lot of vet players say this is the 3rd time dev has done this after feedbacks after feedbacks say how awful these raid events are. Please listen to your player feedbacks. One of the  reason I still stay is because the community has been extremely nice and helpful, and Light message about seeing people complain give me some hope this can change for the better. 

Yes, I understand a lot of people advice you do not need to FOMO in this game, and I can take my time. However, I have only played this game for about a week. I do not understand how generous it is beside this anniversary event and the only way for me to progress my account by clearing story faster is getting good units by pulling.

Sorry if this message is long. Just feel very frustrated with the raids as there are so many banner you get adviced to pull and my only way is to get currency is through story  atm and dailies.

content: Ya it's not there

I was expecting to try the already overly restricted event that favors old players/big payers, but it's okay I thought, nothing wrong with rewarding a supporting player a bit (x3-x5) more, I'll get my share and it is what it is. 
Instead I got hit with a "Wake up earlier loser xdd" + a Poopenfarten3000 Realm Mastery wheel that gives an affinity bonus. Are we celebrating as a community here or is it a damn funeral? Screw the useless wheel, what the hell happened with the raid event? I expected it to be bad, turns out it might as well not exist at all for me personally.
thread_title: Isn't anniversary supposed to be like a celebratory thing? So far it feels like im getting fisted.
